name: gaia-maker
description: Planet and terraforming simulation game written in Rust
readme_summary: Gaia Maker is a planet and terraforming simulation game developed in Rust. It offers a detailed simulation of planetary physics, geology, and environmental cycles, allowing players to influence and shape entire worlds through dynamic gameplay and various terraforming tools.
key_features: Planet simulation based on real physics and geology
Detailed simulation of temperature, biomass, carbon cycle, insolation, and atmospheric composition
Dynamic gameplay with player actions impacting the entire planet
Resource acquisition via fusion reactors and Dyson swarms
Terraforming facilities and methods (oxygen generators, aerosol injection)
Simulation of civilization evolution and planetary impact
primary_use_case: A simulation game where players terraform and manage planets.
cover_image_prompt: A 3D isometric illustration of a miniature, vibrant planet being sculpted by a pair of glowing, ethereal hands. One hand gently adjusts atmospheric clouds, while the other places lush forests and flowing rivers onto the barren surface. Small, holographic screens float around the planet, displaying real-time data streams of temperature, biomass, and atmospheric composition. Subtle digital particles emanate from the hands, representing the terraforming process. The planet's surface shows distinct biomes forming, and tiny, stylized civilizations begin to emerge. The overall mood is one of creation and meticulous control, set against a cosmic backdrop with the 'Gaia Maker' logo subtly integrated into a nebula. The style should be clean, detailed, and visually engaging, emphasizing the transformation of a world.

name: sshm
description: SSHM is a beautiful command-line tool that transforms how you manage and connect to your SSH hosts. Built with Go and featuring an intuitive TUI interface, it makes SSH connection management effortless and enjoyable.
readme_summary: SSHM is a Go-based command-line tool that provides a beautiful and intuitive Text User Interface (TUI) for managing SSH connections. It simplifies adding, editing, and connecting to hosts, offering features like port forwarding, tagging, and real-time status indicators.
primary_use_case: Managing and connecting to SSH hosts through an interactive terminal user interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized librarian meticulously organizing a vast, glowing library of interconnected servers and network cables. The librarian uses a magical, illuminated book (representing the SSHM TUI) to instantly pull up and connect to specific server 'shelves' with a tap. Each server shelf has a status light (green for active, red for offline). Subtle digital particles and data streams flow between the librarian's book and the servers, indicating seamless connection management. The scene is set in a clean, modern digital space with a cool blue and green color palette, emphasizing order and efficiency. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with clear, crisp details.

name: tlock
description: Timelock Encryption made practical. The Go `tlock` library and the `tle` cmd line tool home to encrypt towards the future.
readme_summary: The tlock library and tle command-line tool enable practical timelock encryption and decryption using drand's threshold network. It allows users to encrypt data that can only be decrypted after a specified future round, providing a way to schedule future access to sensitive information.
key_features: Support for mainnet and testnet drand networks
primary_use_case: Encrypting data that should only become accessible at a specific future point in time, determined by a drand network round.
cover_image_prompt: A futuristic vault door with a complex, glowing lock mechanism. Instead of a keyhole, the lock has a digital display showing a future date and round number. A beam of light emanates from a drand beacon (a stylized, glowing sphere with network nodes) and strikes the lock, initiating a countdown. As the countdown progresses, the vault door slowly begins to open, revealing a shimmering, protected data artifact within. Subtle UI elements showing round numbers and encryption progress are visible on a nearby console. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, high-tech aesthetic and vibrant, glowing accents.
